metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🎯 Threat Hunting Dashboard
---
Proactive hunting queries designed to surface low-and-slow attacks that evade alerting. Focuses on rare process executions, LOLBin abuse, first-time-seen network connections, suspicious logon patterns, and encoded command detection across the MDE telemetry."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔬 Rare Process Execution"},"name":"rare-process-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| summarize ExecutionCount = count(), DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceId), Devices = make_set(DeviceName, 3) by FileName
| where ExecutionCount < 5 and DeviceCount == 1
| where FileName !in~ ('conhost.exe', 'WerFault.exe', 'werfault.exe', 'svchost.exe', 'RuntimeBroker.exe', 'SearchIndexer.exe')
| sort by ExecutionCount asc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Processes seen fewer than 5 times on only 1 device — rare execution candidates","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ExecutionCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":5}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-rare-processes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ('winword.exe', 'excel.exe', 'powerpnt.exe', 'outlook.exe', 'onenote.exe', 'msaccess.exe', 'mspub.exe')
| where FileName !in~ ('splwow64.exe', 'dw20.exe', 'dwwin.exe', 'WerFault.exe')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, AccountName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Processes spawned by Office applications — macro/exploit indicator","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-office-spawned"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🛠️ LOLBin & Living-off-the-Land Abuse"},"name":"lolbin-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('certutil.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'rundll32.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'bitsadmin.exe', 'cmstp.exe', 'msiexec.exe', 'odbcconf.exe', 'regasm.exe', 'regsvcs.exe', 'installutil.exe')
| extend SuspiciousArgs = iff(
    ProcessCommandLine has_any ('http', 'https', 'ftp', 'decode', 'urlcache', 'transfer', 'scrobj', 'javascript', 'vbscript', '-decode', '/decode'),
    true, false)
| summarize ExecCount = count() by FileName, SuspiciousArgs, DeviceName
| sort by SuspiciousArgs desc, ExecCount desc","size":0,"title":"LOLBin executions with suspicious arguments flagged","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"SuspiciousArgs","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"true","representation":"critical","text":"Yes"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"No"}]}},{"columnMatch":"ExecCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-lolbin-suspicious"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe')
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('-enc', '-encodedcommand', '-e ')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Encoded PowerShell executions","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-encoded-ps"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🌐 First-Time-Seen Network Connections"},"name":"network-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let LookbackWindow = 30d;
let RecentWindow = 7d;
let HistoricIPs = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(LookbackWindow) .. ago(RecentWindow))
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess' and RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| summarize by RemoteIP;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(RecentWindow)
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess' and RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| where RemoteIP !in (HistoricIPs)
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), DeviceCount = dcount(DeviceName), Devices = make_set(DeviceName, 3) by RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by FirstSeen desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"New external IPs — seen in last 7 days but not in prior 30 days","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FirstSeen","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"DeviceCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":10}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-new-ips"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceNetworkEvents
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| where RemotePort in (4444, 4445, 1337, 8080, 8443, 9001, 9002, 31337, 1234, 6666, 6667, 6668, 6669)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Connections to known C2 ports","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-c2-ports"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔐 Suspicious Logon Patterns"},"name":"logon-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType == 'Network'
| where IsLocalAdmin == true
| summarize AdminLogonCount = count(), Devices = make_set(DeviceName, 5) by AccountName, AccountDomain
| where AdminLogonCount > 3
| sort by AdminLogonCount desc","size":0,"title":"Accounts with network admin logons on multiple devices — lateral movement with privilege","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"AdminLogonCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-admin-logons"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonFailed'
| summarize FailCount = count(), TargetDevices = dcount(DeviceName) by AccountName, AccountDomain
| where FailCount > 20
| sort by FailCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Accounts with high logon failure count — credential spray or brute force","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"FailCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-logon-failures"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceLogonEvents
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| where LogonType == 'Network'
| extend Hour = datetime_part('Hour', TimeGenerated)
| where Hour between (0 .. 5)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain, RemoteIP, LogonType
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Network logons between midnight and 5am — off-hours access","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-offhours-logons"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔍 Persistence & Discovery Techniques"},"name":"persistence-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('schtasks.exe', 'at.exe')
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ('/create', '/change', '-create')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Scheduled task creation","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-schtasks"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName in~ ('whoami.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'nltest.exe', 'ipconfig.exe', 'systeminfo.exe', 'quser.exe', 'tasklist.exe', 'nbtstat.exe', 'arp.exe', 'route.exe', 'netstat.exe')
| summarize ExecCount = count() by FileName, DeviceName, AccountName
| where ExecCount > 3
| sort by ExecCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Discovery command usage — recon tool execution","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ExecCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":20}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-discovery"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":"","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
